compiled_state.title: GREEN: Integrate scorer into brainstorm SKILL.md
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

Update plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md:
- Replace the Priority guidance block (lines 416-419, the 'P2: Standard new capability... default if unclear' text) with an instruction to read and apply the shared scorer from plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/value-effort-scorer.md
- The scorer invocation happens before the ticket create command: agent reads scorer, assesses value (1-5) and effort (1-5), maps to priority via matrix, then passes -p <priority> to create
- Preserve existing -d flag usage

SAFEGUARD FILE: protected per CLAUDE.md rule 18.

## File Impact
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `ruff check` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/*.py $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/**/*.py
- [ ] `ruff format --check` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/*.py $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Brainstorm references shared scorer
  Verify: grep -q 'shared/prompts/value-effort-scorer' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
- [ ] No default P2 text remains
  Verify: { grep -q 'default if unclear' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md; test $? -ne 0; }
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Gap Analysis Amendment (major)
Brainstorm integration specifics:
(a) Scorer is invoked in Phase 3 Step 1, BEFORE ticket creation — agent reads the scorer prompt, assesses value/effort, determines priority
(b) The inline priority guidance block (P0-P1: unblocks..., P2: default..., P3-P4: nice-to-have) is REPLACED by a reference to the scorer
(c) Scorer is read inline as prompt guidance (not dispatched as sub-agent) — same pattern as the complexity evaluator prompt
(d) Existing brainstorm approval gate tests do not need updates since they test Phase 2 gates, not Phase 3 priority assignment
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
